zh.lifeSummary: 當Countesse Marguerite de Turenne於1120年1月15日出生在法國努維勒-阿吉泰可雷圖倫時，她的父親Raymond Turenne I44歲，母親Mathilde de Perche44歲。她於1147年之前與Adhémar de Limoges IV在法國波特-哈倫斯哈倫特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1173年5月28日在法國努維勒-阿吉泰哈倫-馬利安古林斯享年53歲，埋葬在法國波特-哈倫斯哈倫特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Countesse Marguerite de Turenne于1120年1月15日出生在法国努維勒-阿吉泰可雷圖倫时，她的父亲Raymond Turenne I44岁，母亲Mathilde de Perche44岁。她于1147年之前与Adhémar de Limoges IV在法国波特-哈倫斯哈倫特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1173年5月28日在法国努維勒-阿吉泰哈倫-馬利安古林斯享年53岁，埋葬在法国波特-哈倫斯哈倫特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Turenne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Normand, Donat, Emile, Francois, Philomene, Serge, Yves.
French: habitational name from Turenne, the name of several places in the southwestern part of France, e.g. in Corrèze, named with pre-Latin tur ‘height’.
History: Pierre Blanchard dit Turenne from Poitiers in Vienne, France, married Gertrude-Michelle Dupuis in Trois-Rivières, QC, in 1733.

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Countesse Marguerite de Turenne was born on 15 January 1120, in Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, her father, Raymond Turenne I, was 44 and her mother, Mathilde de Perche, was 44. She married Adhémar de Limoges IV before 1147, in Charente, Poitou-Charentes, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 28 May 1173, in Angoulins, Charente-Maritime, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, at the age of 53, and was buried in Charente, Poitou-Charentes, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Countesse Marguerite de Turenne est née le 15 janvier 1120, à Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, son père, Raymond Turenne I, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Mathilde de Perche, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé Adhémar de Limoges IV avant 1147, à Charente, Poitou-Charentes, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 28 mai 1173, à Angoulins, Charente-Maritime, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Charente, Poitou-Charentes, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Countesse Marguerite de Turenne am 15. Januar 1120 in Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Raymond Turenne I 44 und ihre Mutter Mathilde de Perche 44. Sie hat vor 1147 in Charente, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich Adhémar de Limoges IV geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 28. Mai 1173 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Angoulins, Charente-Maritime, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich und wurde in Charente, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Countesse Marguerite de Turenne è nata il il 15 gennaio 1120 nel Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, sua padre, Raymond Turenne I, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Mathilde de Perche, aveva 44 anni. Lei sposato Adhémar de Limoges IV prima del 1147, nel Charente, Poitou-Charentes, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 28 maggio 1173, nel Angoulins, Charente-Maritime, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolta a Charente, Poitou-Charentes, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Countesse Marguerite de Turenneが1120年1月15日にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインコルeズトゥレンで生まれた時，父Raymond Turenne Iは44歳，母Mathilde de Percheは44歳であった。1147年以前にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツチャーエントでAdhémar de Limoges IVと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1173年5月28日にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインチャーエンテ-マリティメアンゴウリンスで53歳で死去し，フランスポイトウ-チャーエンツチャーエントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Countesse Marguerite de Turenne(이)가 1120년 1월 15일 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 코e즈 터렌에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Raymond Turenne I(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde de Perche(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 1147년 이전 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 처트에서 Adhémar de Limoges IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1173년 5월 28일 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 처테-마이팀 앤굴인스에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 처트에 묻혔다.

mn.15 JAN 1120–28 MAY 1173: 1120 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 15–1173 оны Тавдугаар сарын 28

pt.15 JAN 1120–28 MAY 1173: 15 de janeiro de 1120–28 de maio de 1173
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Countesse Marguerite de Turenne nasceu em 15 de janeiro de 1120, em Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Raymond Turenne I, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde de Perche, tinha 44 anos. Ela casou-se com Adhémar de Limoges IV antes 1147, em Charente, Poitou-Charentes, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 28 de maio de 1173, em Angoulins, Charente-Maritime, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, com 53 anos, e foi sepultada em Charente, Poitou-Charentes, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Countesse Marguerite de Turenne родилась 15 января 1120 г. в местности туренн, коррeз, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция, её отцу по имени Raymond Turenne I было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Mathilde de Perche, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Adhémar de Limoges IV перед 1147 г. в местности чарент, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 28 мая 1173 г. в местности ангоулинс, чаренте-маритим, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности чарент, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция.

es.15 JAN 1120–28 MAY 1173: 15 de enero de 1120–28 de mayo de 1173
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Countesse Marguerite de Turenne nació el 15 de enero de 1120, en Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, su papá, Raymond Turenne I, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Mathilde de Perche, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Adhémar de Limoges IV antes de 1147, en Charente, Poitou-Charentes, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 28 de mayo de 1173, en Angoulins, Charente-Maritime, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultada en Charente, Poitou-Charentes, Francia.
